data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location-specific variants.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Location-specific variants where needed', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking process and user interactions but do not address the validation of location-specific variants in the context of the biz-configurable status vocabulary. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of validation for location-specific variants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for location-specific variants.
